creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
some adobe products are not maintained today.
	I think some caution messages should be added for users of these ports
	or remove these ports.
	www/linux-flashplugin7 : adobe says no new versions will be provided.
	www/linux-flashplugin9 : no new plugins are provided for
		http://www.adobe.com/support/security/bulletins/apsb09-10.html,
		except debugger till now.
	print/acroread8 and localized versions : no new versions are proveded
		till now.
